name: unswipe
description: Microscopic, zero-dependency carousel powered by CSS Scroll Snap and Intersection Observer

scripts.build: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:plugins && pnpm run build:types && pnpm run build:css
scripts.build:plugins: esbuild src/plugins/autoplay.ts --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=dist/plugins/autoplay.js && esbuild src/plugins/autoplay.ts --bundle --minify --format=cjs --outfile=dist/plugins/autoplay.cjs && esbuild src/plugins/navigation.ts --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=dist/plugins/navigation.js && esbuild src/plugins/navigation.ts --bundle --minify --format=cjs --outfile=dist/plugins/navigation.cjs && esbuild src/plugins/pagination.ts --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=dist/plugins/pagination.js && esbuild src/plugins/pagination.ts --bundle --minify --format=cjs --outfile=dist/plugins/pagination.cjs && esbuild src/plugins/drag.ts --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=dist/plugins/drag.js && esbuild src/plugins/drag.ts --bundle --minify --format=cjs --outfile=dist/plugins/drag.cjs
scripts.build:site: pnpm --filter docs exec astro telemetry disable && pnpm --filter docs build
scripts.docs:preview: pnpm run build:site && pnpm --filter docs preview
scripts.ci: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run build:site
